iteration_4.note: Added too-detailed counting code that caused multi-dataset-report to timeout

iteration_5.note: Counting guidance caused invalid_emails miscount; reverted to iteration 1 version

changes_made: Replaced 570-line verbose SKILL.md with 120-line focused CSV analysis skill
Removed all SQL templates, report templates, visualization guides not relevant to tasks
Added Python-based CSV processing patterns (csv.DictReader, json.dump)
Added specific code snippets for: dedup, groupby, aggregation, date parsing, email validation, revenue calc, monthly breakdown
Removed unused scripts/ directory (data-init.sh, query.sh) not referenced by SKILL.md
Removed unused WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv (970KB dataset not used by tasks)
remaining_issue: data-clean report-accuracy gets 50% (15/30 points) because gemini-3-flash counts dates_standardized=7 (all rows including duplicates) instead of 5 (unique rows only). The task prompt says 'counted before dedup' which the model interprets literally. Attempts to add counting guidance either didn't change behavior or hurt other tasks.
